data.name: A Night With Neil
data.detailed_description:
​NEW UPDATE - A NIGHT WITH NEIL, REMASTERED​

​​A complete remake of "A Night With Neil" in Ren'Py, re-imagining the text CYOA as a visual novel. Experience the same great scenes with full audio workup, an editing pass, and over 100 custom renders to add to your experience with Neil. Over a year in the making, now available to the public!

​OLD DESCRIPTION BELOW​

"A Night With Neil" is the first in, hopefully, a series of choose-your-own-adventure text games focusing on my various characters. Hang out with Neil! Get banged by Neil! Get ate by Neil!

Features:
- 23,000+ words of lewd content
- 12 different endings
- 140+ custom images
- Full audio detail
- Oral/Anal/Cock/Navel/Sheath vore, facesitting, feeding, m/player sex, underwear TF (same-size)
- Oral/Anal vore (macro/micro)
- Hot deer
